de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionVariable

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionVariable
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionVariable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionVariable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExecutionAllArrayIndicesVariable

    public class ExecutionVariable
extends AbstractExecutionVariable
    The default implementation of IExecutionVariable.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ExecutionValue lengthValue
      The ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.
      private IExecutionNode<?> parentNode
      The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.
      private ExecutionValue[] values
      The possible values of this IExecutionValue.

      Constructor for a "normal" value.

      Computes the combined path condition of all Goals which is the or combination of each path condition per Goal.

      Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of IExecutionVariable.getProgramVariable().

      Returns the ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.

      Returns the parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.

      Returns the parent IExecutionValue if available.

      Returns the possible values of this IExecutionVariable.

      Groups all Goals which provides the same value.

      Analyzes the side proof defined by the ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo and creates ExecutionValues from it.
      protected boolean isValidValue(Term value)
      Checks if the given Term represents a valid value.
      protected ExecutionValue[] lazyComputeValues()
      Computes the value for getValues() lazily when the method is called the first time.

      • parentNode

        private final IExecutionNode<?> parentNode
        The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.

        The ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.

        The possible values of this IExecutionValue.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExecutionVariable

        public ExecutionVariable(IExecutionNode<?> parentNode,
                 Node proofNode,
                 PosInOccurrence modalityPIO,
                 IProgramVariable programVariable,
                 Term additionalCondition)
        Constructor for a "normal" value.
        Parameters:
        parentNode - The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.
        programVariable - The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.

      • ExecutionVariable

        public ExecutionVariable(IExecutionNode<?> parentNode,
                 Node proofNode,
                 PosInOccurrence modalityPIO,
                 ExecutionValue parentValue,
                 IProgramVariable programVariable,
                 Term additionalCondition)
        Constructor for a "normal" child value.
        Parameters:
        settings - The ITreeSettings to use.
        parentNode - The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.
        parentValue - The parent ExecutionValue or null if not available.
        programVariable - The represented IProgramVariable which value is shown.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.

      • ExecutionVariable

        public ExecutionVariable(IExecutionNode<?> parentNode,
                 Node proofNode,
                 PosInOccurrence modalityPIO,
                 ExecutionValue parentValue,
                 Term arrayIndex,
                 ExecutionValue lengthValue,
                 Term additionalCondition)
        Constructor for an array cell value.
        Parameters:
        parentNode - The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.
        parentValue - The parent ExecutionValue or null if not available.
        arrayIndex - The index in the parent array.
        lengthValue - The ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.
        additionalCondition - An optional additional condition to consider.

    • Method Detail

      • getValues

        public ExecutionValue[] getValues()
                           throws ProofInputException
        Returns the possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
        Returns:
        The possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • lazyComputeValues

        protected ExecutionValue[] lazyComputeValues()
                                      throws ProofInputException
        Computes the value for getValues() lazily when the method is called the first time.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • instantiateValuesFromSideProof

        protected ExecutionValue[] instantiateValuesFromSideProof(InitConfig initConfig,
                                              Services services,
                                              TermBuilder tb,
                                              ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo info,
                                              Operator resultOperator,
                                              Term siteProofSelectTerm,
                                              Term siteProofCondition)
                                                   throws ProofInputException
        Analyzes the side proof defined by the ApplyStrategy.ApplyStrategyInfo and creates ExecutionValues from it.
        Parameters:
        initConfig - The InitConfig of the side proof.
        services - The Services of the side proof.
        tb - The TermBuilder of the side proof.
        info - The side proof.
        resultOperator - The Operator of the result predicate.
        siteProofSelectTerm - The queried value.
        siteProofCondition - The condition under which the value is queried.
        Returns:
        The created ExecutionValue instances.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • isValidValue

        protected boolean isValidValue(Term value)
        Checks if the given Term represents a valid value.
        Parameters:
        value - The value to check.
        Returns:
        true valid value, false invalid value to be ignored.

      • groupGoalsByValue

        protected void groupGoalsByValue(ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                     Operator operator,
                     Term siteProofSelectTerm,
                     Term siteProofCondition,
                     Map<Term,List<Goal>> valueMap,
                     List<Goal> unknownValues,
                     Services services)
                          throws ProofInputException
        Groups all Goals which provides the same value.
        Parameters:
        goals - All available Goals to group.
        operator - The Operator of the Term which provides the value.
        services - The Services to use.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException

      • computeValueCondition

        protected Term computeValueCondition(TermBuilder tb,
                         List<Goal> valueGoals,
                         InitConfig initConfig)
                              throws ProofInputException
        Computes the combined path condition of all Goals which is the or combination of each path condition per Goal.
        Parameters:
        tb - The TermBuilder to use passed to ensure that it is still available even if the Proof is disposed in between.
        valueGoals - The Goals to compute combined path condition for.
        initConfig - The InitConfig to use.
        Returns:
        The combined path condition.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • createSelectTerm

        public Term createSelectTerm()
        Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of IExecutionVariable.getProgramVariable().
        Returns:
        The created term.

      • getParentValue

        public ExecutionValue getParentValue()
        Returns the parent IExecutionValue if available.
        Specified by:
        getParentValue in interface IExecutionVariable
        Overrides:
        getParentValue in class AbstractExecutionVariable
        Returns:
        The parent IExecutionValue if available and null otherwise.

      • getParentNode

        public IExecutionNode<?> getParentNode()
        Returns the parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.
        Returns:
        The parent IExecutionNode which provides this ExecutionVariable.

      • getLengthValue

        public ExecutionValue getLengthValue()
        Returns the ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.
        Returns:
        The ExecutionValue from which the array length was computed.
